title: AutoRNA dataset
author: Kazanskii, Maksim
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The dataset used for the preprint :  AutoRNA: RNA tertiary structure prediction using variational autoencoder (https://doi.org/10.1101/2024.06.18.599511). The dataset contains of a zipped folder. Each file is in *.ent format.
steps_raw: The dataset used for the preprint :  AutoRNA: RNA tertiary structure prediction using variational autoencoder (https://doi.org/10.1101/2024.06.18.599511). The dataset contains of a zipped folder. Each file is in *.ent format.
